turns.content:
# Handoff — Implement the remaining unblocking work for feedback-ring activation

## Overview

The feedback-ring activation track is fully committed and in-review; the one piece of *remaining unblocking work* is a critical, already-triaged test-api data-loss bug that currently gates trustworthy evidence recording for the whole track. This session committed all feedback-ring source, stores, `.test` evidence, session history, and the `feedback-mcp` registration across three commits, folded the review decisions into the tickets (fix direction on the prune bug + two new tracker dependency edges), and reconciled the index. Start by implementing the prune-bug fix (ticket `1e8f6866`) using the already-decided per-spec scoping approach, validate it, and move it to `in-review`. Do **not** close any of the in-review tickets — closure is human-gated (8 tickets total).

## Shorthand And Placeholder Legend

- `<root>` = the repo root working directory `c:/Users/linus/git/graph_app/context-engine` (start here).
- `<memory-api>` = the `memory-api` submodule at [memory-api](memory-api), which owns the ticket/spec/test stores and the `test-api` crate.
- `BUG` = ticket `1e8f6866` (the remaining unblocking work).
- `ROUTE` = ticket `905d05ae`. `ACT` = tracker `6b0002bf`. `DESIGN` = `fb6aa078`. `PROV` = `a7601cb7`. `INGEST` = `b4954d6c`. `MAP` = `16e112a7`. `BFS` = `3fa60398`. `SYNTH` = `3d4c4739`.

## Ticket Legend (full UUIDs)

- `ACT` → [6b0002bf [feedback-api][activation] Wire feedback discovery, collection, and analyzer loop (ring activation)](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/6b0002bf-c15b-4cc7-ac38-fbf66a07d1bc/ticket.toml)
- `BUG` → [1e8f6866 [test-api] prune_execution_runs silently deletes unrelated ticket-linked evidence (global keep-2-runs policy)](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/1e8f6866-9dda-4b2c-9f41-27ac83ee61d5/ticket.toml)
- `ROUTE` → [905d05ae [test-api][test-mcp] Fix record/list .test store routing split; aggregate discoverable stores on read](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/905d05ae-b367-44f8-9988-a671702d8a32/ticket.toml)
- `DESIGN` → [fb6aa078 [feedback-api][design] First-class feedback-api crate boundary and unified FeedbackEntry schema v1](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/fb6aa078-1f8b-4a76-99bd-3a26190b1208/ticket.toml)
- `PROV` → [a7601cb7 [feedback-api][provenance] Extend FeedbackProvenance with session/turn/tool-call backtrace refs](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/a7601cb7-6c92-4891-aa55-07ab46125bb8/ticket.toml)
- `INGEST` → [b4954d6c [feedback-api][ingestion] Mine explicit feedback-ingestion tool calls from structured session metadata](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/b4954d6c-0451-49ed-8939-11f6568558f5/ticket.toml)
- `MAP` → [16e112a7 [feedback-api][signals] Define failed-tool-call to entity mapping and recording policy](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/16e112a7-5ab0-45a5-87c8-7d89d07ffd16/ticket.toml)
- `BFS` → [3fa60398 [feedback-api][signals] Deterministic BFS entity queue for structured feedback mining](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/3fa60398-3154-46ee-aca5-8d87541bac1e/ticket.toml)
- `SYNTH` → [3d4c4739 [feedback-api][analyzer] Backtraceable, verifiable follow-up ticket format; re-enable synthesis behind it](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/3d4c4739-3138-40be-947d-556e5f7de53a/ticket.toml)

## Long-Horizon Goal (epic)

Complete `ACT` ([6b0002bf ring activation](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/6b0002bf-c15b-4cc7-ac38-fbf66a07d1bc/ticket.toml)): a trustworthy feedback ring where structured session signals are mined, mapped to entities, and synthesized into backtraceable follow-up tickets, with `.test` evidence that survives independent writes. `ACT` now `depends_on` all six feature tickets plus `ROUTE` and `BUG`; it cannot legitimately close until `BUG` is fixed.

## Key Entities

- [1e8f6866 BUG ticket](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/1e8f6866-9dda-4b2c-9f41-27ac83ee61d5/description.md) — the work to do; its description now carries the chosen fix direction and rejected alternatives.
- [memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store.rs](memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store.rs) — `prune_execution_runs` (~L470-L521) keys retention on `run_id` alone, globally; `record_execution` (~L133) calls it unconditionally. This is the fix site.
- [memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store/tests.rs](memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store/tests.rs) — existing test `record_execution_keeps_only_newest_two_runs` (~L179-L215) uses a *single* spec `vt-a`, so per-spec scoping keeps it green unchanged; add the new 3-spec regression test alongside it.
- [memory-api/crates/test-api/src/lib.rs](memory-api/crates/test-api/src/lib.rs) — `ValidationExecution` (`validation_spec_id`, `provenance.run_id`, `links.ticket_ids`) fields the fix keys on.
- [17fc536c test-mcp aggregation spec](memory-api/.spec/specs/17fc536c-f08f-4b5f-b6ba-a7bcf1dc4898/spec.toml) — traceability for `ROUTE`; extend if BUG changes retention semantics.

## Findings

- The prune bug is confirmed by direct code read: retention key is `run_id` only, store-global, on every write — it deleted 6 git-tracked DESIGN executions live this session (recovered via `git restore`).
- The existing keep-2 test locks in the buggy behavior but only exercises one spec, so it is compatible with the per-spec fix.
- `ROUTE` (905d05ae) is already implemented and in-review (test-mcp reads now aggregate across discoverable `.test` stores when `workspace` is omitted).

## Decisions (folded into tickets)

- `BUG` fix direction = **Option 1: scope pruning by `validation_spec_id`** (change key to `(validation_spec_id, run_id)`, keep-N per spec). Rejected opt-in flag / keep-count bump / never-prune-linked. Recorded in the `BUG` description.
- `ACT` now `depends_on` `ROUTE` and `BUG` (edges added this session) — the tracker is correctly blocked on the evidence-infra fixes.

## Blockers

- Closing any of the 8 in-review tickets (`DESIGN`, `PROV`, `INGEST`, `MAP`, `BFS`, `SYNTH`, `ROUTE`, and `BUG` once it reaches in-review) is **gated on explicit human approval**. Do not close without it.
- Until `BUG` is fixed, do not record new `.test` executions with fresh `run_id`s across specs (silent-deletion risk; mitigated only by the shared-`run_id` workaround already applied).

## Next Actions (execute in order)

1. Implement `BUG`: in [store.rs](memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store.rs), change `prune_execution_runs` to key retention on `(validation_spec_id, run_id)` and apply the keep-window per spec; add a regression test in [store/tests.rs](memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store/tests.rs) recording 3 executions across 3 distinct `validation_spec_id`s with 3 distinct `run_id`s asserting all survive. Move `BUG` `new → in-implementation`.
2. Validate: `cargo test -p test-api` (existing keep-2 test must stay green; new regression test must pass). `cargo build --workspace` clean. Fill `implementation_summary`/`validation_summary` on `BUG`, then move it to `in-review`.
3. Commit the fix: inside `memory-api` (`feat(test-api): scope execution pruning by validation_spec_id`), then update the `memory-api` pointer at `<root>`.
4. Human-gated: on approval, close the 8 in-review tickets to `done` (walk through `in-review` first — schema enforces required states).
5. Verify the Stop hook fires end-to-end live (session history persists to `.session/`).

## Completion Status

- Action 1 (implement BUG fix): `not-started`
- Action 2 (validate + summaries + in-review): `not-started`
- Action 3 (commit fix + pointer): `not-started`
- Action 4 (human-gated close of 8 tickets): `blocked` — awaiting explicit human approval
- Action 5 (verify Stop hook live): `not-started`

## Definition Of Done

`prune_execution_runs` scopes retention per `validation_spec_id`; the new 3-spec regression test and the existing single-spec keep-2 test both pass; `cargo build --workspace` is clean; `BUG` is in-review with summaries filled; the fix is committed and the `memory-api` pointer updated; no silent cross-spec/cross-ticket deletion remains possible.

## Board / Session Notes

- Board is clean — no active check-in required; check in on `BUG` before editing `store.rs`.
- This session's three commits: `10893b5` + `17f143b` (memory-api source + stores), `2b6b4cb0` (root pointer + `.github/mcp.json` feedback-mcp + `.session/` + `.feedback/`).
- Deliberately left uncommitted (do NOT fold into this track): `memory-viewers` (ticket-viewer frontend + feedback-http — separate track), `.agents/agents/roast.agent.md` (rule-generated — regenerate via `rule sync-targets`, do not hand-commit), and `RESEARCH_VIEWER_ARCHITECTURE.md` (viewer research doc). The live session `ba2cc78a` capture files keep updating as this session runs — expected churn.
- If ticket queries look stale after restart, run `./target/debug/ticket.exe scan --force --toon` from `<root>`.

Execute the next actions in order and continue until all are completed or explicitly blocked.

I’m starting the unblocking `BUG` flow now: I’ll first do the required ticket/board orientation and claim `1e8f6866`, then implement the per-spec prune fix in `test-api`, add the regression test, run validations, update ticket state/summaries, and commit in `memory-api` plus the root pointer update.I’m running a quick ticket-board orientation and state check so we can safely claim the ticket and transition it before touching code.

turns.content:
Implemented and validated the remaining unblocking work for BUG 1e8f6866, then moved it to in-review and committed both the submodule fix and root pointer update.

Completed actions:
1. Action 1 complete
- Claimed board ownership, transitioned BUG to in-implementation, implemented per-spec prune scoping, added regression test.
- Code change in [memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store.rs](memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store.rs#L470): pruning now computes stale runs per (validation_spec_id, run_id), not globally by run_id.
- Existing call site remains at [memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store.rs](memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store.rs#L133).
- New regression test added at [memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store/tests.rs](memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store/tests.rs#L213).
- Existing keep-2 single-spec test remains at [memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store/tests.rs](memory-api/crates/test-api/src/store/tests.rs#L179).

2. Action 2 complete
- Ran cargo test -p test-api in memory-api: passed (29 tests).
- Ran cargo build --workspace in memory-api: passed with warnings only, 0 errors.
- Updated implementation_summary and validation_summary on BUG.
- Ticket now in-review at [memory-api/.ticket/tickets/1e8f6866-9dda-4b2c-9f41-27ac83ee61d5/ticket.toml](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/1e8f6866-9dda-4b2c-9f41-27ac83ee61d5/ticket.toml), with state history in [memory-api/.ticket/tickets/1e8f6866-9dda-4b2c-9f41-27ac83ee61d5/history.ndjson](memory-api/.ticket/tickets/1e8f6866-9dda-4b2c-9f41-27ac83ee61d5/history.ndjson).

3. Action 3 complete

- Root pointer commit created: 57fc049a

4. Action 4 blocked (as requested)

5. Action 5 complete for live persistence check
